_doc: HOS 18.1.0 fs patch offsets. Offsets are TBD -- extract fs.nso from HOS 18.1.0 firmware, decompress it, and run tools/find_offsets.py to get candidates, then verify in Ghidra.

IsGameCardInserted_false_branch._comment: TBD: run find_offsets.py, then verify candidate whose branch target reaches PowerOff chain.

GetGameCardHandle_power_gate_branch._comment: TBD: primary target. Look for BL+CBNZ X0 pair inside IDeviceOperator::GetGameCardHandle.

GetGameCardAttribute_fail_branch._comment: TBD: look for BL+CBNZ X0 pair inside IDeviceOperator::GetGameCardAttribute.
